description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem machines. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, rarray = amachreal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem machines to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the bus and/or machine quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only in-service machines at in-service plants (type code 2 or 3).
for all machines at in-service plants (type code 2 or 3).
for only in-service machines, including those at Type 1 and 4 buses.

string.description: First owner fraction.
Second owner fraction.
Third owner fraction.
Fourth owner fraction.
MVA loading as a percentage of machine MVA base, MBASE.
Machine MVA base.
Step-up transformer tap ratio.
Power factor used in setting reactive power limits for the wind machine when its WMOD is 2 or 3; 1.0 if the machine is not a wind machine.
Positive sequence fault analysis machine resistance.
Positive sequence fault analysis machine subtransient reactance.
Positive sequence fault analysis machine transient reactance.
Positive sequence fault analysis machine synchronous reactance.
Active power output, in MW.
Reactive power output, in Mvar.
abs(PGEN+jQGEN), in MVA.
Active power upper limit, in MW.
Active power lower limit, in MW.
Reactive power upper limit, in Mvar.
Reactive power lower limit, in Mvar.
Active power output (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power output (units determined by power output options).
abs(PGEN+jQGEN) (units determined by power output options).
Active power upper limit (units determined by power output options).
Active power lower limit (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power upper limit (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power lower limit (units determined by power output options).
Non-conventional source per unit maximum total fault current magnitude.
Non-conventional source per unit dead-band minimum voltage.
Non-conventional source per unit dead-band maximum voltage.

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
Sequence data not in case (when STRING = ‘RPOS’, ‘XSUBTR’, ‘XTRANS’, or ‘XSYNCH’).
